source_label: GitHub — fxn/zeitwerk README §Pronunciation (audio recorded "in perfect German")
notes: Zeitwerk is the Ruby code loader that has been Rails' default autoloader since Rails 6 and remains so in Rails 8 The name is German for "clockwork" and follows German spelling rules — Z is "ts", "ei" is "eye", W is "v" — giving TSITE-verk, not the common misreading "ZEET-werk".
